name: Apple Walnut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients; mix well.
3. Pour into a greased and floured 15 x 10 inch jelly roll pan.
4. Bake for 30 minutes or until golden.
5. Cool completely.
6. Spread with cream cheese frosting.
7. Cut into bars.
8. Garnish as desired.
9. Store in refrigerator.
Cream Cheese Frosting:
1. In a small bowl, beat together cream cheese, margarine (or butter), and vanilla until fluffy.
2. Add powdered sugar; mix well.
